description: HuggingFace Content-Length fix test. Changed Content-Length: 0 to {{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}} in huggingface_ndjson_v2 template. Previous issue: blank chat after streaming interruption.

test_messages.expected_behavior: warning text should appear in chat area instead of blank chat

check_items: Is the block response delivered (etap log blocked=1)?
Does the chat area display the warning text?
Does the page show any error or blank state?
